title: clusia pavonii
intro: Clusia pavonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the golden clusia or golden fire bush. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its leaves and bark have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Clusia pavonii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Clusia pavonii can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, and are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems.
